hooks.command: file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then cd /c/Users/PavloKoval1/IdeaProjects/movie-graph/src-tauri && output=$(cargo check 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then echo '=== CARGO CHECK FAILED ==='; echo "$output" | head -40; fi; fi

file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|svelte)$'; then cd /c/Users/PavloKoval1/IdeaProjects/movie-graph && output=$(npm run check 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then echo '=== NPM CHECK FAILED ==='; echo "$output"; fi; fi
